creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dbaio
Date: Wed Jan 17 23:29:55 UTC 2018
New revision: 459296
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/459296

Log:
  security/obfs4proxy-tor: Update pkg-message

  Update pkg-message to reflect obfs4's man page, obfs4 works only as managed
  pluggable transport spawned as a helper process via the tor daemon, and needs
  no extra options to operate in such mode.

  Also fix a typo and a white space.

  PR:		225068
  Submitted by:	Vin?cius Zavam <egypcio@googlemail.com> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/security/obfs4proxy-tor/Makefile
  head/security/obfs4proxy-tor/files/pkg-message.in
